---
title: "Teaching"
---

## Current Courses

### [Course Number]: Course Title
*[Semester, Year]* | [Program: MBA / MSBA / PhD / Undergraduate]

Brief description of the course. One or two sentences on topics covered.

[[Syllabus](files/syllabi/course1_syllabus.pdf)]

### [Course Number]: Course Title
*[Semester, Year]* | [Program]

Description.

## Past Courses

- **[Course]**, [Program], [Years taught]
- **[Course]**, [Program], [Years taught]

## Doctoral Students

I have served on dissertation committees for:

- Student Name (Year, placement)
- Student Name (Year, placement)
